# Feature-completeness test: every abstract-annotation variant
# active simultaneously on the same lot. Exercises
# AbstractDeleteVertex, AbstractDeleteEdge, AbstractOneWay, and
# AbstractTwoWayOriented through the same
# build_abstract_vertex_lookup + apply path.
#
# The purpose is plumbing coverage, not a specific stall-count
# assertion — it should regenerate cleanly, survive a parameter
# change, and not break any of the existing legacy-annotation
# tests.

polygon outer
0,0
500,0
500,400
0,400
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

set stalls_per_face=4
----
set stalls_per_face=4

debug use_abstract_stamp=true
----
debug use_abstract_stamp=true

generate
----
total_stalls: 206

# Delete an interior grid vertex.
annotation delete-vertex on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=x coord=-4 at=lattice:3
----
annotation delete-vertex on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=x coord=-4 at=lattice:3

# Delete the cross-aisle segment next to it.
annotation delete-edge on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=y coord=3 range=lattice:-5,lattice:-4
----
annotation delete-edge on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=y coord=3 range=lattice:-5,lattice:-4

# Mark a parallel-aisle segment one-way.
annotation direction on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=x coord=-3 range=lattice:2,lattice:3 traffic=one-way
----
annotation direction on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=x coord=-3 range=lattice:2,lattice:3 traffic=one-way

# Mark another segment as two-way with oriented lanes.
annotation direction on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=x coord=-2 range=lattice:2,lattice:3 traffic=two-way-oriented
----
annotation direction on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=x coord=-2 range=lattice:2,lattice:3 traffic=two-way-oriented

generate
----
total_stalls: 212

# Stretch parameters. All four annotations should re-apply to the
# new layout via the abstract-index lookup; none of them should
# crash or silently drift.
set stall_depth=22
----
set stall_depth=22

set aisle_width=14
----
set aisle_width=14

generate
----
total_stalls: 218

screenshot
----
